mnemonics: UX GOALS - User eXperience Goals: Great, Obvious, Accessible, Logical, Satisfying
keyPoints: The primary goal of UX is to create products that are useful, easy to use, and enjoyable for users
Good UX design solves user problems and meets business objectives simultaneously
UX goals should be measurable through metrics like task success rate, error rate, and user satisfaction scores
commonMistakes: Prioritizing aesthetic design over functional usability
Designing based on personal preference rather than user research and data
Failing to test designs with actual users from the target audience
